overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt of Rivia exploring a gothic castle interior with checkered marble floors, an ornate brick fireplace, and wooden bookshelves. The character walks through interconnected halls and corridors illuminated by warm firelight and candles, eventually approaching distant figures in a second great hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic castle library with ornate fireplace

agents.ego_description: walking through the main hall, passing the large fireplace and approaching an archway on the left

entered.detail: large arched fireplace with brick interior and metal gate, emitting warm orange light
red and white checkered marble tile flooring
high vaulted ceiling with pointed gothic arches
tall wooden bookshelves filled with books
stone columns with blue and gold decorative patterns

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a grand gothic library hall with a checkered marble floor. A large brick fireplace burns warmly on the right, while wooden bookshelves line the left wall. The camera follows as he approaches an archway exit ahead.

events.description: enters narrow archway corridor leaving the main hall

agents.ego_description: walking through the stone archway into a narrower connecting corridor

entered.detail: narrow stone corridor with pointed arch ceiling connecting the two halls
lit candles mounted on the corridor walls providing dim illumination

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow stone corridor with checkered flooring continuing from the previous hall. Wall candles provide dim lighting as Geralt walks toward the distant exit of the passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: second great hall with distant occupants

events.description: exits corridor into a second large hall with high ceilings
two human figures become visible standing in the distance near a table

agents.ego_description: emerging into the second hall and walking toward two figures standing near a distant table

notable_agents.action: two figures standing near a wooden table in the distance, possibly conversing

entered.detail: large open hall with gothic arches and checkered flooring similar to the first hall
decorative chain or chandelier hanging from the ceiling center
tall wooden bookshelves lining the right wall of the hall

segments.scene_description: Geralt emerges from the corridor into a second grand hall with similar gothic architecture. Two figures stand in the distance near a table, and the character continues walking toward them as the hall opens up with bookshelves visible on the right and warm lighting throughout.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a gothic castle interior that transitions from a grand library into a narrow passage and finally into a second expansive hall. It begins by following Geralt across a checkered marble floor in a library, passing a warmly burning brick fireplace and towering wooden bookshelves. As he reaches an archway, the scene shifts into a dim, narrow stone corridor where the lighting becomes sparse, provided only by flickering wall candles. The camera then follows him as he emerges from the confinement of the passage into a second grand hall, where the space opens up once more to reveal bookshelves on the right. Finally, the movement continues toward two distant figures standing by a table under the warm glow of the hall's architecture.
